creator: stsp@stsp.name
text:
Small correction to the "How-To-Repeat" section:

The sentence:
  
  "As non-root user who can write to /usr/obj, run:"
  
should have been:
  
  "As non-root user who can write to /usr/ports or wherever your
  WRKDIRPREFIX points to, run:"

-- 
stefan
